# Closed-Loop Law Evolution Pipeline

## 1. Overview

The closed-loop pipeline automatically discovers, validates, and applies consciousness laws to the engine in a self-reinforcing cycle. Starting from a single measurement loop (Tier 1), the system evolved through self-tuning (Tier 2), multi-loop competition (Tier 3), and finally consciousness-driven discovery where ConsciousLM itself proposes new laws during inference (Tier 4).
